Politics.headline: Secret Service fatally shoots armed man who breached Trump's Mar-a-Lago residence
Politics.detail: An armed man was fatally shot by the Secret Service after breaching the perimeter of former President Trump's Mar-a-Lago residence in Florida; Trump was in Washington D.C. at the time of the incident.

Politics.headline: DHS reverses on TSA PreCheck pause as snowstorm scatters travel
Politics.detail: The Department of Homeland Security reversed its decision to pause TSA PreCheck due to a large snowstorm that affected air travel, causing disruptions and delays.

Politics.headline: Oman confirms US-Iran talks will take place in Geneva on Thursday
Politics.detail: Oman's Foreign Minister announced that a third round of nuclear talks between Iran and the U.S. will be held in Geneva on February 26th.

Politics.headline: Clashes in Albania as protesters demand PM Rama resign
Politics.detail: Violence erupted near parliament in Albania as protesters demanded accountability from Prime Minister Rama's government amid a corruption investigation.

Politics.headline: New border rules for British dual nationals need to be quickly shut down, say Lib Dems
Politics.detail: Liberal Democrats are calling for the swift reversal of new border rules affecting British dual nationals.

Finance & Economy.headline: Trump promises new tariffs, slams Supreme Court decision
Finance & Economy.detail: The Supreme Court blocked Trump's emergency tariffs, but he plans to invoke other laws to maintain and raise tariffs.

Finance & Economy.headline: UK job vacancies 'fall to lowest level since pandemic'
Finance & Economy.detail: Advertised roles dropped 3% last month to 695,000 – first dip below 700,000 since January 2021, job site Adzuna says.

Finance & Economy.headline: Haryana mandates exclusive banking with public sector banks, drops IDFC First and AU Small Finance
Finance & Economy.detail: Haryana mandates exclusive banking with public sector banks, dropping IDFC First and AU Small Finance.

Finance & Economy.headline: Global Market Today: Asian shares hesitant, dollar slips amid tariff confusion
Finance & Economy.detail: Asian shares are showing hesitancy, and the dollar is slipping amidst confusion surrounding tariffs.

Finance & Economy.headline: Trump imposes 15% tariffs on all countries after SCOTUS struck down earlier tariffs
Finance & Economy.detail: President Trump signed an order that will impose 10% tariffs on imports from all countries, just hours after the Supreme Court struck down a different set of sweeping global tariffs.

Technology.headline: Former SpaceX and Google executive Dex Hunter-Torricke launches AI policy nonprofit
Technology.detail: Dex Hunter-Torricke, a former senior communications executive at SpaceX, Facebook, Google, Google DeepMind, and the United Nations, has launched The Center for Tomorrow, a new UK-based nonprofit focused on the systemic risks and governance gaps emerging in the age of advanced AI. The initiative is a response to a lack of coordinated planning for AI's economic, political, and environmental consequences.

Technology.headline: India joining this U.S.-led tech alliance could help supply chains
Technology.detail: India is joining the U.S.-led Pax Silica initiative, giving Washington its biggest win yet in the race to shape and influence who has access to advanced semiconductors and AI infrastructure supply chains. India's participation brings one of the world's largest technology markets, and a member of the BRICS alliance, into Pax Silica at a moment when competition over AI hardware is intensifying across geopolitical blocs.

Technology.headline: Future of tech companies lies in AI models: Inmobi CEO
Technology.detail: The power of technology companies is shifting from software to AI models trained using proprietary data, according to a top official at InMobi. This comes as the Indian government backs open-source models for sovereign AI development, sparking debate about the future of the country's IT firms.

Technology.headline: Latest Tech News: PSE, IOS Updates, & Indonesia's CSE
Technology.detail: This article discusses recent advancements in technology, specifically focusing on PSE (Penyelenggara Sistem Elektronik) in Indonesia, iOS updates, and breakthroughs in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE). Cybersecurity is a critical focus in CSE, with researchers developing new techniques for detecting, preventing, and recovering from cyberattacks.

Technology.headline: AI agent invasion has tech world and markets scrambling to pick winners
Technology.detail: An increase in AI agents capable of handling tasks like coding and tax advice is causing the tech world and financial markets to identify promising companies and discard underperforming ones. Leading AI model creators are implementing “agentic” capabilities, offering software assistants that can independently manage tasks like software application development based on simple instructions.

Science.headline: Pecans Found to Improve Cholesterol and Boost Heart Health
Science.detail: A new scientific review suggests that pecans may pack more heart power than many people realize, with consistent evidence that eating pecans can improve cholesterol.

Science.headline: Flea and Tick Treatments for Dogs and Cats May Be Harming Wildlife
Science.detail: Scientists found that active ingredients from isoxazoline treatments pass into pet feces, exposing dung-feeding insects to toxic chemicals, suggesting an unexpected environmental cost of these medications.

Science.headline: Language barriers slow down the international diffusion of knowledge, study finds
Science.detail: A recent study has found that language barriers continue to impede the international spread and application of knowledge.

Science.headline: Extreme heat waves trigger unexpected nanoparticle formation in air
Science.detail: Research indicates that extreme heat waves can lead to the formation of nanoparticles in the air, which may have implications for air quality and health.

Science.headline: Scientists may have seen a star collapse directly into a black hole without exploding first
Science.detail: Scientists may have observed a star collapsing directly into a black hole without the typical supernova explosion.

Health.headline: A long-acting HIV drug arrives in Zimbabwe for some at highest risk
Health.detail: A new medication for HIV prevention has been made available in Zimbabwe.

Health.headline: Nurses and New York hospital system reach a tentative deal to end the city's largest nursing strike.
Health.detail: A tentative agreement has been reached between nurses and a New York hospital system, potentially ending the largest nursing strike in the city.

Health.headline: Social media can be addictive even for adults, but there are ways to cut back.
Health.detail: Even adults can develop social media addictions, but strategies exist to reduce use.

Health.headline: WHO validates elimination of trachoma as a public health problem in Libya
Health.detail: The World Health Organization (WHO) has confirmed that Libya has eliminated trachoma as a public health concern.

Health.headline: Air quality monitoring for enhanced understanding of health impacts and beyond
Health.detail: Monitoring air quality through continuous data collection is critical for detecting air pollutants and ensuring information.

Sports.headline: Tyler Reddick wins at Atlanta to give Michael Jordan second straight NASCAR Cup victory
Sports.detail: Tyler Reddick's victory at Atlanta marks the second consecutive NASCAR Cup win for Michael Jordan's team, 23XI Racing, at the start of the 2026 season.

Sports.headline: Jack Hughes loses teeth then scores Olympic ice hockey winner for US
Sports.detail: Jack Hughes lost teeth from a high-stick to the mouth before scoring the Olympic gold-winning goal for the United States in their match against Canada.

Sports.headline: Eze hurts Tottenham again to reignite Arsenal's title hopes and Liverpool grabs late winner
Sports.detail: Eze's performance against Tottenham has boosted Arsenal's Premier League title aspirations, while Liverpool secured a late victory.

Sports.headline: NFL Wide Receiver Rondale Moore Found Dead at 25 Years Old
Sports.detail: Vikings receiver Rondale Moore passed away at the age of 25, prompting tributes and reflections on his career.

Sports.headline: U.S. defeats Canada for its first gold in Olympic men's hockey since 'Miracle on Ice'
Sports.detail: The United States defeated Canada to win its first gold medal in Olympic men's hockey since the 1980 'Miracle on Ice'.

Entertainment.headline: Indian movie 'Boong' bags BAFTA award for Best Children's & Family Film
Entertainment.detail: The film, directed by Lakshmipriya Devi and backed by Farhan Akhtar, is an emotional drama about Manipur and its people, and it won over international nominees like 'Lilo and Stitch' and 'Zootropolis 2'. Devi dedicated the award to her home state and prayed for peace to return to Manipur.

Entertainment.headline: Alia Bhatt greets BAFTA 2026 audience in Hindi while presenting award
Entertainment.detail: Alia Bhatt presented the award for Best Film Not in the English Language at the 2026 BAFTA ceremony, opening with a 'Namaste' and delivering part of her presentation in Hindi. She also spoke about cinema's universality, noting that while films speak many languages, emotion remains their common thread.

Entertainment.headline: Leonardo DiCaprio-starrer 'One Battle After Another' wins big at BAFTA Awards 2026
Entertainment.detail: 'One Battle After Another' emerged as the night's biggest winner with six awards at the BAFTA 2026 ceremony held at the Royal Festival Hall. Prince William presented the BAFTA Fellowship to Donna Langley, chairman of NBCUniversal Entertainment.

Entertainment.headline: Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna head to Udaipur ahead of February 26 wedding
Entertainment.detail: On February 23, 2026, Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna were spotted at the Hyderabad airport, dressed in coordinated outfits, as they left for Udaipur. Reports suggest they are traveling for pre-wedding celebrations and the main wedding ceremony.

Entertainment.headline: Nicole 'Snooki' Polizzi Diagnosed With Cervical Cancer
Entertainment.detail: The 'Jersey Shore' star revealed her diagnosis with adenocarcinoma in a February 2026 TikTok video. She shared that her results at a post-op appointment for a cone biopsy showed stage 1 cervical cancer.

Crime & Justice.headline: Mother of Nottingham attacks victim calls for 'whole truth' to emerge at inquiry
Crime & Justice.detail: The mother of a victim from the Nottingham attacks is urging for the complete truth to be revealed during the inquiry into the events.

Crime & Justice.headline: Romance fraud: warning over scam that turns victims into insurance cheats
Crime & Justice.detail: A warning has been issued regarding romance fraud, where scammers manipulate victims into becoming unwitting participants in insurance scams.

Crime & Justice.headline: Violence erupts after Mexican cartel leader "El Mencho" killed in federal operation
Crime & Justice.detail: Following the death of Nemesio Rubén Oseguera Cervantes, also known as "El Mencho," the leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, violence has broken out after he was killed in a military operation by Mexico's Ministry of Defense security forces.

Crime & Justice.headline: US military strikes another alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, killing 3
Crime & Justice.detail: The US military conducted a strike on a suspected drug boat in the eastern Pacific, resulting in three fatalities.

Crime & Justice.headline: Spanish police arrest 3 men suspected of shipping dried opium poppy by mail
Crime & Justice.detail: Spanish police have arrested three men who are suspected of mailing dried opium poppy capsules within Spain and to other countries, including the United States; they have been charged with drug trafficking related crimes.

Education.headline: No Leak In Maharashtra HSC Chemistry Exam, Board Clarifies Amid Rumours
Education.detail: The Maharashtra State Board of Secondary and Higher Secondary Education has denied rumors of a leak in the HSC Chemistry exam, which was held today.

Education.headline: Primary Education Minister calls for modernizing primary education system
Education.detail: Bangladesh's Primary and Mass Education Minister A N M Ehsanul Hoque Milon has advocated for innovative approaches to modernize the primary education system and make it more relevant to current needs, emphasizing transparency and good governance.

Education.headline: Los Angeles schools to issue RIF notices to 657 staff
Education.detail: Los Angeles schools are preparing to issue reduction in force (RIF) notices to 657 staff members.

Education.headline: School Assembly News Headlines (February 23): Top National, World, Business, Sports News
Education.detail: A collection of top news headlines for school assemblies covering national, world, business and sports news.

Education.headline: University of Texas System adopts new teaching limits despite faculty concerns
Education.detail: The University of Texas System has recently implemented new teaching limits, a decision that has sparked concern among faculty members.

Lifestyle.headline: Is running bringing out the worst in people?
Lifestyle.detail: The recent TBR Dream Marathon was quick to spawn a couple of controversies on social media, revealing a strange, almost snobbish mindset among some runners, prompting discussion about being considerate and avoiding competition in non-competitive events. The author suggests to be good to each other and listen when someone is telling you that you're wrong or that you could do better, and to worry about your own run and pay no mind to who's maxing out the full eight hours.

Lifestyle.headline: Holi 2026 vastu tips: 5 things to clear out before celebrating the festival of colours
Lifestyle.detail: This article provides Vastu tips for preparing your home for Holi, a Hindu festival of colors. It suggests clearing out certain items to bring positive energy and good fortune.

Lifestyle.headline: Three brides, three seasons of becoming
Lifestyle.detail: A story of three brides, three seasons of becoming.

Lifestyle.headline: Oh, Philippines, the spectacle that you are.
Lifestyle.detail: An opinion piece reflecting on the current state of affairs in the Philippines.

Lifestyle.headline: I spent my 40s and 50s saving for the retirement my 70s can't even enjoy—here are 6 things I'd tell my younger self
Lifestyle.detail: A 72-year-old reflects on decades of saving for retirement, realizing that health limitations now prevent fully enjoying those savings. The author advises balancing financial planning with present experiences and not letting fear rob you of joy, plan for tomorrow, but don't forget to live today.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Why our brains can't handle a modern economy
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Megan McArdle discusses the challenges our brains face in keeping up with the complexities of the modern economy.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: A new reminder of America's debt problem
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Editorial Board highlights the growing concerns and implications of America's increasing national debt.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: I plan to donate my organs — but I've taken my name off the registry
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Etan Yeshua explains the personal reasons behind their decision to donate organs while removing their name from the official registry.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on Scottish Labour: Keir Starmer needs Anas Sarwar's act of betrayal to pay off
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses the political dynamics within the Labour party and the potential consequences of Anas Sarwar's actions.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: RFK Jr.'s focus on viral nonsense is putting children's lives at risk
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This opinion piece discusses concerns about Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s focus on viral misinformation and the potential harm it poses to children's health, referencing a measles outbreak.

Zimbabwe.headline: Independent issues unreserved apology to President ED Mnangagwa over ZBC story
Zimbabwe.detail: The Zimbabwe Independent has issued an apology to President Emmerson Mnangagwa, the Ministry of Information, Publicity and Broadcasting Services and the Zimbabwe Broadcasting Corporation over claims that US$52 million in licence-fee revenue had gone missing, admitting that its recent article was not supported by verified official audit findings and contained insinuations that could have been interpreted as questioning the President's integrity.

Zimbabwe.headline: High Stakes Showdown: Zimbabwe to shock West Indies?
Zimbabwe.detail: There is anticipation for a high-stakes cricket match between Zimbabwe and the West Indies. No details about the match itself are provided.

Zimbabwe.headline: China helps Zimbabwe grow US$1.2 billion tobacco crop amid debt, health concerns
Zimbabwe.detail: Tobacco dominates Zimbabwe's trade with Beijing as the country's largest agricultural export and a primary foreign currency earner.

Zimbabwe.headline: Bulawayo teenager arrested after toddler abducted from city mall
Zimbabwe.detail: A 14-year-old girl has been arrested in Bulawayo after allegedly abducting a two-year-old child from a city mall.

Zimbabwe.headline: Ziyambi claim of a diaspora vote under the new constitutional amendments is a legal deception
Zimbabwe.detail: Ruben Mbofana and Tendai Ruben discuss Ziyambi's claim regarding the diaspora vote and new constitutional amendments.
